sections.paragraph:
σύνολος, η, ον in description of completeness (Pla., Aristot., pap, LXX; ApcEsdr 5, 13 p. 30, 8 Tdf.; adv. συνόλως Ath., R. 15 p. 67, 2) adverbial τὸ σύνολον (LXX) at all, whatsoever Ac 23:14 v.l. (s. pap cited L-S-J-M; Herm. Wr. II, 8 [Sc. 138]).

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

ApcEsdr ApcEsdr = Apocalypse of Esdras—List 2

Tdf. Tdf. = CvTischendorf—List 1, beg.

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

Ath. Ath. = Athenagoras, II a.d.—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

L-S-J-M L-S-J-M = (L-S-J) HLiddell/RScott, A Greek-English Lexicon; New Edition by HSJones/RMcKenzie—List 6

Herm. Wr. Herm. Wr. = Hermetic Writings—List 5

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 974
